body_txt: A beard, usually white, extending a good ways down, is part of the standard appearance of a Wizard Classic . The length of a beard roughly indicates his ability as a wizard, as a really long beard can often indicate someone who is beyond a "natural" lifespan . See also Robe and Wizard Hat . Compare and Contrast Beard of Barbarism , Beard of Evil (some evil wizards have this instead of a Wizard Beard.). If the character has a goatee or circle beard instead of a full beard, it can go with Goatee of Intellect , which is when goatees and circle beards are associated with intelligence.
